---
title: "SQL Course"
description: "Learn the basics of SQL and how to use it to query databases, analyze data, and build powerful data-driven applications."
toc: true
toc-depth: 3
page-layout: full
---

::: {.content-block}
:::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="45%"}
<div style="min-height: 100px;">
### Einfuehrung und technisches Setup
Subtitle for introduction and technical setup
</div>

::: {.card .shadow-sm .p-3 .h-100}
![File Preview](../files/Agentic_Engineering_preview.jpg){.border .rounded .mb-3}

<div class="mt-auto">
[Download PDF File](../files/Agentic_Engineering_01.pdf){.btn .btn-outline-primary .w-100 role="button" target="_blank"}
</div>
:::
:::

::: {.column width="10%"}
:::


::: {.column width="45%"}
<div style="min-height: 100px;">
### SQL Project
Subtitle for SQL Project
</div>

::: {.card .shadow-sm .p-3 .h-100}
![File Preview](../files/Agentic_Engineering_preview.jpg){.border .rounded .mb-3}
    
<div class="mt-auto">
[Download SQL File](../files/Excel_Aufgaben.xlsx){.btn .btn-outline-primary .w-100 role="button" target="_blank"}
</div>
:::
:::

::::

:::
